name: BedTimeStory
developer: eeKim, Hyeonjik Son, JoJJoong, Sena Min, Nina, Gun Kang, Woosung Kim, ciel45, Seohyun Yoon
short_description: "Protect the Teddy Bear and Survive!" Defend the teddy bear tower at the center of the map and survive against waves of enemies. As time passes, enemies become stronger and more relentless, challenging your skills and strategic thinking. Can you withstand the escalating chaos and emerge victorious?
detailed_description:
Game Overview


Key Features

🛡 Survive and Defend

Protect the teddy bear tower from relentless waves of enemies.

Survive as long as possible while managing resources and positioning strategically.

⚡ Upgrade Your Abilities

Enhance your Attack Power, Movement Speed, Reload Speed, and Skill Cooldown through the upgrade system.

Choose your upgrades wisely to create the perfect build for survival.

🎲 Reroll System with Lock Mechanic

Want a better upgrade? Use the Reroll feature to refresh your stats.

Lock certain upgrades to keep them unchanged, but beware – the reroll cost increases with each locked stat!

🔥 Challenging Waves of Enemies

Every 90 seconds, stronger and faster enemies will appear.

The difficulty scales dynamically, ensuring every wave is more intense than the last.

🏆 Leaderboard and Ranking System

Your final score is based on remaining tower HP, player HP, and total enemies defeated.

Compete for the yourself to break your previous records.

How to Play

1️⃣ Defend the teddy bear tower from enemy waves.

2️⃣ Earn gold and upgrade your stats to become stronger.

3️⃣ Use the reroll system to customize your build strategically.

4️⃣ Survive as long as possible while protecting your tower.

5️⃣ Compete for high scores and challenge your limits!

Are You Ready to Defend and Survive?

Design - eeKim,Nina

Programming -  JJoJJoong,PakaDopa,ciel45
Art - Hyeinjik Son,Sena Min
Sound - Gun kang
Promotion - Seohyun Yoon
